Metadata.description: Join 24,000+ African students discovering scholarships, internships, fellowships and 1:1 mentorship on Voila. Free CV builder included.
Metadata.ogDescription: Scholarships, internships, mentorship and a free CV builder — all personalised to your profile. Join 24,000+ African students already on Voila.
Metadata.ogImageAlt: Voila — Scholarships, Internships & Mentorship for African Students
Metadata.twitterDescription: Scholarships, internships, mentorship and a free CV builder — personalised for African students. Free to join.

hero.subtitle: Voila matches scholarships, internships, and programs to your profile — with mentorship and CV tools in one place.

items.question: Is Voila free to use?
items.answer: Yes! Creating an account, browsing opportunities, and matching with mentors is completely free for students.

items.question: How does mentor matching work?
items.answer: We use the profile details you provide (like your field of study and career goals) to suggest mentors who have relevant experience. You can browse suggested coaches and request to connect.

items.question: Can I track my applications here?
items.answer: Yes, our built-in tracker lets you save opportunities you discover on the platform and monitor their deadlines and statuses all in one place.

items.question: Are the CV templates free?
items.answer: Yes! You can use our CV builder and export your resume using any of our professional templates at no cost.

cta.title: Ready to find your next opportunity?
cta.description: Join Voila and start with a personalised feed in minutes.
cta.note: No credit card required · Free for students

About.metaDescription: Learn more about Voila's mission, approach, and support for students.
About.title: A career platform built for African students.
About.intro: Voila helps students discover scholarships, internships, fellowships, mentorship and CV tools in one place. We bring personalised opportunity matching, application tracking, and guided career support to ambitious learners across Africa.

mission.title: Our mission
mission.text: To close the gap between students and global opportunities by making discovery, applications, and mentorship simple, reliable, and accessible.

whyItMatters.title: Why it matters
whyItMatters.text: Many talented students miss out because opportunities are scattered across sites and follow-up is hard. Voila brings those experiences together so students can move forward with confidence.

cards.title: Personalised discovery
cards.text: We match opportunities to a student's profile so they see listings that matter most.

cards.title: Track every step
cards.text: Save listings, monitor deadlines, and keep notes without switching between docs and email.

cards.title: Mentorship support
cards.text: Connect with coaches who help students make better decisions and submit stronger applications.

builtForStudents.title: Designed to help you go from discovery to application.
builtForStudents.text: Whether you are searching for scholarships, internships, or career mentorship, Voila brings the tools and recommendations into one workflow.

MentorMeta.title: Mentors — Voila
MentorMeta.description: Meet mentors on Voila and apply to become a mentor.

hero.title: Become a mentor on Voila
hero.subtitle: Share your experience, guide ambitious students, and make a real difference — one session at a time.

whatToExpect.title: Flexible commitment
whatToExpect.description: Mentor on your own schedule — book sessions when it suits you.

whatToExpect.title: Matched students
whatToExpect.description: We pair you with students based on your expertise and their goals.

whatToExpect.title: In-app tools
whatToExpect.description: Everything you need — messaging, calendar, and session links — in one place.

responsibilities: Provide mentorship and career advice to students.
Review CVs, applications, and scholarship projects.
Help mentees set goals and track progress.
Share practical experience from your field.

instructions.title: Instructor Application
instructions.description: Apply to join our mentor community and help students navigate scholarships, internships, and career growth. We review every application and reach out within 5–7 business days.

form.helper: Fill in your details below and we'll review your mentor application.
form.motivation: Why do you want to become a mentor?*
form.successAlert: Application submitted — we will review and be in touch.

Footer.tagline: Building career confidence for African students and young professionals.
Footer.madeWith: Made with care for African students 🌿

PrivacyPolicy.metaDescription: How Voila collects, uses, and protects your personal data across our mobile app, web app, and website.
PrivacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy

blocks.text: Voila Africa ("we," "us," "our," "the Platform") provides a platform that helps African students and recent graduates discover scholarships, internships, and fellowships, and offers additional tools including a CV builder, mentorship matching, and opportunity discovery. This Privacy Policy explains what personal data we collect, how we use it, and the choices you have.
This Policy applies to our mobile application, our web application (app.voila-africa.com), and our website (voila-africa.com).
If you have questions about this Policy, contact us at support@voila-africa.com.
2.1 Information you provide directly

items: Account information: name, email address, phone number, password
Academic information: institution, degree level, field of study, graduation year
Profile information: interests, career preferences, opportunity preferences
CV/resume content you create using the CV Builder
Mentorship information: availability, session notes, messages exchanged with mentors or mentees
Payment information processed through our payment provider, Paystack (we do not store full card details ourselves)
Communications you send us, including support requests

blocks.text: 2.2 Information collected automatically

items: Device information (device type, operating system, app version)
Usage data (features used, pages viewed, session duration)
Log data (IP address, access times, crash reports)
Cookies and similar technologies on our website (see Section 8)

blocks.text: 2.3 Information from third parties

items: If you sign in using a third-party service (e.g. Google), we may receive basic profile information from that service
Scholarship, internship, and fellowship listings may be sourced from public or partner sources

blocks.text: We use your information to:

items: Create and manage your account
Match you with relevant opportunities, mentors, and mentorship sessions
Operate the CV Builder and save your CV content
Process payments for any paid features
Send you service-related communications (deadline reminders, digest emails, account notices)
Send you marketing communications where you have opted in (you may opt out at any time)
Improve and personalize the Platform
Detect, prevent, and address fraud, abuse, or technical issues
Comply with legal obligations

blocks.text: Where applicable, we process your personal data on the following bases:

items.text: for optional communications and certain optional features
to provide the services you've signed up for
to improve our Platform and keep it secure

blocks.text: We aim to comply with Ghana's Data Protection Act, 2012 (Act 843), and, where applicable to users in other jurisdictions, comparable data protection standards.
We do not sell your personal data. We share information with:

items.text: who help us operate the Platform, including:
limited to the profile and session information necessary to facilitate mentorship
where required by law, court order, or to protect the rights, property, or safety of Voila Africa, our users, or others
in the event of a merger, acquisition, or sale of assets, subject to this Policy or a comparable one

blocks.text: We retain your personal data for as long as your account is active, or as needed to provide you services. If you delete your account, we will delete or anonymize your personal data within 30 days, except where we are required to retain it for legal, tax, or security purposes.
Depending on your location, you may have the right to:

items: Access the personal data we hold about you
Correct inaccurate data
Request deletion of your data
Object to or restrict certain processing
Withdraw consent where processing is based on consent
Request a copy of your data in a portable format

blocks.text: To exercise these rights, contact us at support@voila-africa.com. We may need to verify your identity before fulfilling your request.

Our website (voila-africa.com) may use cookies and similar technologies to remember your preferences (including language selection), understand site usage, and improve performance. You can control cookies through your browser settings.

We use reasonable technical and organizational measures to protect your data, including encryption in transit and access controls on our backend infrastructure. However, no method of transmission or storage is 100% secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.

Your data may be processed and stored on servers located outside your country of residence, including through our infrastructure and service providers. Where this occurs, we take steps to ensure appropriate safeguards are in place.

The Platform is intended for users who are at least 16 years old. We do not knowingly collect personal data from children under this age. If you believe a child has provided us with personal data, please contact us so we can take appropriate action.

Opportunity listings and other content on the Platform may link to third-party websites (e.g. scholarship providers, application portals). We are not responsible for the privacy practices of those third parties. Please review their privacy policies separately.

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of material changes through the Platform or by email. Continued use of the Platform after changes take effect constitutes acceptance of the revised Policy.
If you have questions or concerns about this Privacy Policy or how we handle your data, contact us at:

TermsOfService.metaDescription: The terms that govern your use of Voila's mobile app, web app, and website.
TermsOfService.title: Terms of Service

blocks.text: By accessing or using Voila Africa's mobile application, web application, or website (collectively, the "Platform"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service ("Terms"). If you do not agree, please do not use the Platform.

Voila Africa helps African students and recent graduates discover scholarships, internships, and fellowships. The Platform also provides a CV builder, mentorship matching, and related tools. We do not guarantee that any opportunity listed on the Platform is accurate, currently open, or that you will be selected for it, and we are not affiliated with the organizations offering those opportunities unless explicitly stated.
You must be at least 16 years old to create an account. By creating an account, you represent that the information you provide is accurate and that you meet this age requirement.

You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activity under your account. Notify us immediately at support@voila-africa.com if you suspect unauthorized access to your account.
You agree not to:

items: Provide false or misleading information
Use the Platform for any unlawful purpose
Harass, abuse, or harm other users, including mentors or mentees
Attempt to access another user's account without authorization
Interfere with or disrupt the Platform's operation or security
Scrape, copy, or redistribute Platform content without our permission
Impersonate any person or entity

blocks.text: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these Terms.
Scholarship, internship, and fellowship listings are provided for informational purposes. We make reasonable efforts to keep listings accurate and up to date, but:

items: We do not guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or availability of any listing
Application deadlines and requirements are set by the third-party organizations, not Voila Africa
You are responsible for verifying details directly with the opportunity provider before applying

blocks.text: Content you create using the CV Builder remains yours. You are solely responsible for the accuracy of the information in your CV. We provide the tool for your convenience but do not review, verify, or endorse the content you create.

items: Mentorship sessions are facilitated through the Platform, including video sessions conducted via Jitsi.
Mentors are not employees of Voila Africa. Mentorship is provided on a best-efforts, voluntary or arranged basis, and we do not guarantee specific outcomes from any mentorship relationship.
Both mentors and mentees agree to conduct themselves respectfully. Voila Africa reserves the right to remove any user from the mentorship program for inappropriate conduct.
Voila Africa is not responsible for the advice, guidance, or conduct of mentors, which reflects the mentor's own views and not those of Voila Africa.
Certain features of the Platform may require payment, processed securely through Paystack.
All fees are stated in Ghanaian Cedi (GHS) and are non-refundable except where required by law or explicitly stated at the time of purchase.
You are responsible for any taxes applicable to your purchase.
We reserve the right to change pricing with reasonable notice.

blocks.text: The Platform, including its design, logos, text, and underlying software, is owned by Voila Africa or its licensors and is protected by intellectual property laws. You may not copy, modify, distribute, or create derivative works from the Platform without our prior written consent.

You retain ownership of content you submit (such as your CV or profile information), but you grant Voila Africa a limited license to use, host, and display that content as necessary to operate the Platform.

The Platform integrates with third-party services, including Paystack (payments), Supabase (infrastructure), and Jitsi (video). Your use of these integrated services may also be subject to their respective terms and privacy policies.

The Platform is provided "as is" and "as available," without warranties of any kind, whether express or implied. We do not warrant that the Platform will be uninterrupted, error-free, or secure, or that any opportunity listing is accurate or that mentorship will result in any particular outcome.

To the maximum extent permitted by law, Voila Africa and its founders, employees, and affiliates shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising from your use of the Platform, including but not limited to loss of opportunities, data, or income, even if we have been advised of the possibility of such damages.

You agree to indemnify and hold harmless Voila Africa from any claims, damages, losses, or expenses arising from your use of the Platform, your violation of these Terms, or your violation of any rights of a third party.

We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your account at our discretion, with or without notice, for conduct that we believe violates these Terms or is otherwise harmful to the Platform or other users. You may also delete your account at any time through the app settings.

We may update these Terms from time to time. We will notify you of material changes through the Platform or by email. Continued use of the Platform after changes take effect constitutes acceptance of the revised Terms.
These Terms are governed by the laws of the Republic of Ghana, without regard to conflict of law principles.
If you have questions about these Terms, contact us at:
